ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., puzzle creator, admin, player) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "puzzle_type" TEXT /* Type of puzzle (e.g., logic, word, math) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the puzzle (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules or instructions for the puzzle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the puzzle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the puzzle was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the puzzle is active and available for users */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or categories associated with the puzzle */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzles_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being attempted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the attempt */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the attempt */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer submitted by the user */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's answer was correct */,
  "is_solved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the puzzle was solved */,
  "hints_used" INTEGER /* Number of hints used by the user during the attempt */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the attempt (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attempt being scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the puzzle */,
  "attempts_made" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the user for this puzzle */,
  "correct_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of correct attempts made by the user */,
  "average_completion_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to complete the puzzle over all attempts */,
  "is_best_score" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the user's best score for the puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_scores_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES puzzle_attempts ("attempt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle creator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the puzzle */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user became a puzzle creator */,
  "total_puzzles_created" INTEGER /* Total number of puzzles created by the user */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the puzzles created by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_creators_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_creators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback was provided anonymously */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the user for this puzzle */,
  "average_score" INTEGER /* Average score achieved by the user for this puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)
